_meta.description: Video gallery: Videos -> VideoGalleryMedia + Media + LinkSetting. Runs via dedicated VideoGalleryEngine (NOT the generic mapping engine — this file is a UI entry/marker; the column logic lives in server/src/engine/videogallery-engine.js). The app reads videos from VideoGalleryMedia via gallery/getVideoGalleryQuickView — NOT from Gallery/GalleryMedia (see legacy/LESSONS_LEARNED.md). Idempotent: already-migrated VideosId are skipped.
